calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
CHRISTOPHER M. WINDLE, ESQ.(SONNENSCHEIN NATH & ROSENTHAL LLP), (925)949-2625, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, ERINA YAMAMOTO
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, LIMAN QIAN

THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ERINA YAMAMOTO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF CANNOT PURSUE COMPLAINT BASED ON NON-PAYMENT OF RENT BECAUSE THE AMOUNT WAS NOT STATED IN THE 3 DAY NOTICE. PLAINTIFF CANNOT PURSUE THE COMPLAINT BASED ON SMOKING BECAUSE IT IS NOT A TERM OF THE LEASE. PLAINTIFF CAN AMEND THE COMPLAINT ON THE ISSUE OF MULTIPLE OCCUPANTS, IF SHE CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH BEING IN COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 37.9A(2)(B), SINCE THE OPPOSITION IS BASED IN PART ON FACTS NOT INCLUDED IN THE COMPLAINT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
